testcase.name: contextLoads

if exists FKqvuw43ro0fltcdiuc01qol7kh Hibernate: drop table if exists categories cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists conversations cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists logs cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists lokalizacje cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists messages cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists moderacje cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists ogloszenia cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists opinie cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists raport_szczegolowy cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists regulacje cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists reporty cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists transakcje cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists ulubione_ogloszenia cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists zdjecia cascade Hibernate: create table categories ( id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table conversations ( id bigint generated by default as identity, topic varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table logs ( timestamp date, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint, action varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table lokalizacje ( id bigint generated by default as identity, city varchar(255), region varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table messages ( conversation_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, receiver_id bigint, sender_id bigint, timestamp timestamp(6), content varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table moderacje ( advertisement_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, moderator_id bigint, timestamp timestamp(6), action varchar(255), reason varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table ogloszenia ( price float(53), category_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, location_id bigint, user_id bigint, description varchar(255), product_description varchar(255), title varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table opinie ( rating integer not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, reviewed_user_id bigint, user_id bigint, comment varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table raport_szczegolowy ( created_at timestamp(6), created_by_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, description varchar(255), type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table regulacje ( created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, content varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table reporty ( advertisement_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, reporter_id bigint, reason varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table transakcje ( amount float(53), advertisement_id bigint, buyer_id bigint, date timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, seller_id bigint, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table ulubione_ogloszenia ( advertisement_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255), password varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) check (role in ('ADMIN','STAFF','USER')), username varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table zdjecia ( advertisement_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, url varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists logs add constraint FKgqy8beil5y4almtq1tiyofije foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists messages add constraint FKt492th6wsovh1nush5yl5jj8e foreign key (conversation_id) references conversations Hibernate: alter table if exists messages add constraint FKt05r0b6n0iis8u7dfna4xdh73 foreign key (receiver_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists messages add constraint FK4ui4nnwntodh6wjvck53dbk9m foreign key (sender_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists moderacje add constraint FKqigrubuif73q39c6hewmq8sg0 foreign key (advertisement_id) references ogloszenia Hibernate: alter table if exists moderacje add constraint FK6m71tldyw2xlhy6fvoicxa6a0 foreign key (moderator_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists ogloszenia add constraint FKs5v8c21s0q4052gvchgnxs0pp foreign key (category_id) references categories Hibernate: alter table if exists ogloszenia add constraint FKg9hhvs1gd65p73t87bxx79wui foreign key (location_id) references lokalizacje Hibernate: alter table if exists ogloszenia add constraint FKhhxcjqrxd2shyq36503nu0iao foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists opinie add constraint FKs3wfqlauem86i0mm60ur6bs6o foreign key (reviewed_user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists opinie add constraint FKykjlljs0ntbgyodekyfc91lh foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Matri\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.6\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.6.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
